name: Tropospheric Ozone (Photochemical Smog)
description: Tropospheric ozone builds through the photochemical NOx cycle: NO2 photolysis makes ozone while ozone titrates NO back to NO2 in a null cycle, but VOC oxidation produces peroxy radicals that convert NO to NO2 without consuming ozone, so net ozone accumulates and depends on the VOC-to-NOx balance.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["NOx + VOCs + sunlight"]
    N2["NO2 photolysis (hv)"]
    N3["O + O2 -> O3"]
    N4["O3 + NO -> NO2 (null)"]
    N5["VOC oxidation -> RO2/HO2"]
    N6["RO2 converts NO->NO2"]
    N7["Extra NO2 photolyzed"]
    N8{"Net O3 accumulates?"}
    N9["VOC-limited: cut VOC"]
    N10["Photochemical smog"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|no| N9
    N9 -->|limit| N5
    N8 -->|yes| N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics: From Air Pollution to Climate Change (3rd ed.)
sources.authors: Seinfeld, J. H.; Pandis, S. N.

sources.title: The role of NO and NO2 in the chemistry of the troposphere and stratosphere
sources.journal: Annual Review of Earth and Planetary Sciences
